calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Boldline Apparel, Inc., a/k/a Bold Line USA.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Jimmy Cho, President of Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Boldline Apparel, Inc., a/k/a Bold Line USA.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 3, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant Boldline Apparel, Inc., a/k/a Bold Line USA, on November 22, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 3, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Boldline Apparel, Inc., a/k/a Bold Line USA, as follows:

Damages - $36,072.00.
Interest - $5,277.38.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $519.85.

Total - $43,069.23.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Continued To May-02-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
